metas.name: Hotaru no Yomeiri
metas.description:
Genres: Drama, Romance Tags:Yandere/Josei/Assassins/Historical/Heterosexual/Prostitution On the surface, Satoko has it all—she’s beautiful, the daughter of a nobleman, and at a prime age for marriage. Unfortunately, she is also quite ill and only has a short time left to live. Before she can secure a marriage that will redeem her worth in her family’s eyes, she finds herself the target of the mysterious assassin Shinpei, and her plans are put in jeopardy. In order to save herself, she makes a desperate proposal—of marriage! When it comes to love, however, Shinpei takes “until death do we part” seriously.

(Source: VIZ Media)

metas.name: Dragon Ball Super: Beerus
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure Tags:Shounen/Gods/Super Power/Martial Arts/Henshin/Male Protagonist/Aliens Dragon Ball Super: Beerus, a project that was started a few years ago, is the newly ENHANCED edition of the anime Dragon Ball Super. ENHANCED by the latest visual expression, every scene, especially the battle scenes, is even more immersive, providing a more faithful and detailed reproduction of the original work by Akira Toriyama, and it will deliver a quality that is sure to fully satisfy audiences.

(Source: Dragon Ball Official Site)

metas.name: Tenshou shita Dai Seijo wa, Seijo de Aru Koto wo Hita Kakusu
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy Tags:Female Protagonist/Dragons Fia always dreamed of becoming a knight. Born into a family of knights, she’s the least talented among them, but she still clutches to her hope and trains with everything she has. When the day comes for her to slay a small demon and prove her worth, she ends up face to face with a dragon instead! A deadly injury makes her life flash before her eyes…and she suddenly remembers her former life, when she was a powerful Saint in a bygone era who defeated the Demon King. That life ended in pain because of who she was, making her fear ever becoming a Saint again. Now that the magic from her previous life has been rekindled, she may become a more powerful knight than she ever dreamed–if only she can survive long enough!

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

metas.name: Mahou Shoujo Ikusei Keikaku: restart
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Fantasy, Mahou Shoujo, Thriller Tags:Female Protagonist/Primarily Female Cast/Kuudere/Magic A stage reading in the Magical Girl Raising Project franchise announced that an anime adaptation of Asari Endou's Magical Girl Raising Project Restart light novel volumes has been green-lit. Hiroyuki Hashimoto reported on Twitter that he will return from the first Magical Girl Raising Project anime as the director. The franchise's Twitter account also teased that various initiatives are in the works for "Project restart."

(Source: Anime News Network)

metas.name: Kyouran Reijou Nia Liston
metas.description:
Genres: Fantasy Tags:Female Protagonist A great hero lies undefeated on her deathbed, regretting that she never found a foe who could take her down. She never intended to meet her fate anywhere other than on the battlefield, and her peaceful demise has her wishing desperately that things could have been different... But when she suddenly comes to in the body of the young, frail Nia Liston, she’s got an all-new fight ahead of her. Nia is a sickly child, meaning she has a long way to go before she’s in fighting form. Now that she’s been given a second shot at life, however, she’s determined to get what she wants. She’s going to live—and die—for battle this time! Make way for the Merciless Maiden!

(Source: J-Novel Club)

metas.name: Kyoufu Collector
metas.description:
Genres: Horror, Mystery, Supernatural Tags:Urban Fantasy/Youkai Urban legends come to life…Everyone’s heard an urban legend before, but few have ever come face-to-face with one. These phenomena are everywhere, existing in the shadows of reality. More and more of them have been appearing in the wake of the faceless kid sighted all over Japan. If you see her or one of the urban legends she brings―pray the boy in the red hood finds you before it’s too late. You won’t stand a chance on your own. But with his help, you may just live to see another day…

(Source: Yen Press)

metas.name: Gensou Suikoden
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy Tags: During Suikoden Live Broadcast, Konami announced Suikoden: The Anime, an anime adaptation of Suikoden II. Suikoden: The Anime will be the first anime series directly handled by Konami Animation.

(Source: finalweapon.net)

metas.name: Shin Tennis no Ouji-sama: U-17 WORLD CUP Kesshou Member Ketteisen
metas.description: Genres: Action, Comedy, Sports Tags:Primarily Teen Cast/Foreign/Ensemble Cast/Male Protagonist/Primarily Male Cast/Shounen/Tennis Sequel to Shin Tennis no Ouji-sama: U-17 WORLD CUP SEMIFINAL.

metas.name: Junket Bank
metas.description:
Genres: Drama, Psychological, Thriller
Tags:Gambling/Male Protagonist/Seinen/Primarily Adult Cast
Mitarai, a bank clerk bored with his everyday life and work, soon finds himself transferred to the "Appraisal Unit." Guided by his new boss Usami, Mitarai's led through a secret underground passage within the bank where a new, exciting world of gambling awaits.

metas.name: Tensei Goblin Dakedo Shitsumon Aru?
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Drama, Fantasy, Romance Tags: Office worker Akira Yagami’s altruistic nature usually gets him the short end of the stick. When he dies after saving a kid from oncoming traffic...he reincarnates in another world as a goblin?! Normally, goblins only live for seven days, but Akira’s newfound powers let him defy the species’ normal life span...and are the key to his path to becoming the strongest goblin ever!

(Source: Yen Press)

metas.name: Battle Spirits [Re] Zekkai No Ku
metas.description: Genres: Action Tags:Card Battle New Battle Spirits TV Anime.

metas.name: TANK CHAIR: Sensha Isu
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Sci-Fi Tags:Full CGI Shizuka takes on the most dangerous of assassin jobs, but she's not the one doing the killing. Rather, it's her brother, Nagi, a strong assassin who took a bullet to protect his sister, leaving him in a comatose state and having to use a wheelchair. However, Shizuka has figured out the key to waking her brother up: he must be faced with killing intent! Thus begins a violent journey of recovery, battling the most dangerous foes!

(Source: Kodansha USA)
